post_generation_updates: The data-field ledger was provenance-normalized and extended for the emulator reference scale during the historical reconstruction pass. The Davis reconstruction added the normalized Table 4 derivative and its row-level correction-ledger fields without regenerating the immutable pre-audit inventory; the provenance-status correction added the authority-source relationship. The primary-source scale-recovery pass added fields for the non-executable original velocity-observation transcription. The Davis evidence-intake pass updated the correction-ledger field descriptions to record that raw OCR is retained but is unsuitable for cell verification. The pre-audit inventory remains an immutable checkpoint inventory.
